display.purpose: Landing hero only. Serif, ~2.75rem ceiling. The one place the app raises its voice.

headline.purpose: Section titles and modal titles. Serif, balanced wrap.

body.purpose: Show data and prose. System sans, 65-75ch for prose.

label.purpose: Form labels, tab text, metadata. Sentence case, ink-muted.

shadows.name: card-resting
shadows.purpose: The landing/content card. A whisper of lift on the taupe body.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modal dialog; the one place a heavier shadow is correct.

shadows.name: toast
shadows.purpose: Floating toast pill, clearly lifted off content.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Soft accent halo on focused inputs. Not elevation; the only other use of the shadow channel.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions (chevron rotate, toast slide). 0.15-0.22s.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Add / Save. The accent-fill action; appears at most once or twice per surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.69 0.15 50); color: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.60 0.16 50); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.69 0.15 50) 40%, transparent); }

components.name: Cancel Button
components.description: The quiet secondary action beside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-cancel { background: oklch(0.955 0.014 50); color: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-cancel:hover { background: oklch(0.985 0.003 50); }

components.name: List Tabs
components.description: The signature four-list switcher in the dark header. Active tab fills with its list's deep variant; white text. Inactive tabs are translucent-white outlines.
components.html:
Watching
Waiting
Recommending
Up Next
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0; background: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; padding: 8px 4px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease-out, border-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .ds-tab-active { background: oklch(0.42 0.13 150); border-color: oklch(0.42 0.13 150); color: #fff; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: List Chip
components.description: Outline pill for the add-to-list picker. Selected state inverts to a filled chip.
components.css: .ds-chips { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6px; } .ds-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 34px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; border: 1.5px solid oklch(0.58 0.13 150); border-radius: 6px; color: oklch(0.58 0.13 150); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease-out; user-select: none; } .ds-chip-selected { background: oklch(0.58 0.13 150); color: #fff; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Labeled text field. Accent border plus soft halo on focus.
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.40 0.018 50); margin-bottom: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.78 0.020 50); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-family: inherit; color: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.60 0.012 50); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.69 0.15 50); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.69 0.15 50) 22%, transparent); }

components.name: Show Row
components.description: The core list primitive. Flat, hairline-separated, with an expandable title (chevron rotates on open).
components.html: Severance★ 8.7Apple TV+
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.83 0.014 50); font-size: 14px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-row-title { flex: 1; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline dotted oklch(0.60 0.012 50); text-underline-offset: 3px; } .ds-row-title:hover { color: oklch(0.69 0.15 50); } .ds-chev { display: inline-block; width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: -3px; } .ds-chev svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; fill: none; stroke: oklch(0.40 0.018 50); stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; transition: transform 0.18s ease-out; } .ds-row-rating { color: oklch(0.40 0.018 50); font-size: 13px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-star { color: oklch(0.83 0.16 90); } .ds-row-net { color: oklch(0.55 0.11 230); font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Action-confirmation pill, bottom-center. Accent Undo button on reversible actions.
components.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; max-width: 480px; background: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); color: oklch(0.985 0.003 50); padding: 10px 14px 10px 18px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0.18 0.03 50 / 0.18), 0 14px 32px oklch(0.18 0.03 50 / 0.22); } .ds-toast-undo { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.69 0.15 50); border: none; padding: 4px 10px; font: inherit; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-toast-undo:hover { color: #fff; background: oklch(0.32 0.04 50); }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Teaches the list's purpose, then offers a pill CTA. Never a blank 'nothing here'.
components.html:
Nothing here yet

Once you've watched something worth recommending, move it here.
components.css: .ds-empty { text-align: center; padding: 48px 20px 36px; color: oklch(0.40 0.018 50); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-empty-headline { font-family: ui-serif, 'New York', 'Iowan Old Style', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-empty-help { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 360px; margin: 0 auto 18px; } .ds-empty-cta { background: oklch(0.69 0.15 50); color: oklch(0.22 0.025 50); border: none; padding: 8px 22px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-empty-cta:hover { background: oklch(0.60 0.16 50); }

narrative.overview: Show Picker Club looks like a warm paper almanac a small group of friends keeps together: a curated, color-coded record of what everyone is watching. The member page is the canonical surface; every other screen is measured against it. The mood is domestic and editorial at once. A serif display face gives section headers the authority of a printed page, system sans carries every piece of data underneath, and the body is a committed warm taupe rather than the usual near-white. Cards float on that taupe as near-white paper. Nothing shouts. The system runs on restraint: exactly one earned accent (brand orange), reserved for primary actions, the current selection, and live state, with color otherwise coming from a quiet four-list vocabulary. Surfaces are flat at rest; depth appears only on genuinely raised layers, and even then as a soft ink-tinted ambient shadow. This explicitly rejects the 'AI made this' surface: no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no side-stripe callouts, no tracked-uppercase eyebrows, no identical icon-card grids.
keyCharacteristics: Warm taupe paper body; near-white cards float on it.
Serif for headers, system sans for everything else. No third typeface.
One orange accent, used on ≤10% of any screen.
Quiet four-list color vocabulary, never decorative.
Flat surfaces; shadow only on raised layers, soft and ink-tinted.
Every action confirms with a toast; reversible ones offer Undo.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The brand orange appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes 'add this' and 'this is selected' read instantly. If two oranges compete on a screen, one is wrong.

rules.name: The Deep-Variant Rule
rules.body: A list-* color is for outline pills, hover tints, and decoration. The moment white text sits on a list color, switch to its tab-* variant. White on a list-* fill fails AA; white on a tab-* fill passes it. This rule exists because we shipped the violation once.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Exactly one serif display face and one system sans. A third typeface is indecision, not richness. Hierarchy comes from weight and the serif/sans switch, never from a new family.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Rows, chips, and panels are flat with hairline borders. Shadow is for the card, the modal, and the toast. If it looks like a 2014 app, the shadow is too dark and the blur is too tight.

dos: Do anchor every new surface on the member page: taupe body, near-white card, serif headers, sans body, one orange accent.
Do keep the accent rare — primary action, current selection, and live state only.
Do use the tab-* deep variant the instant white text sits on a list color.
Do keep surfaces flat; reach for shadow only on the card, modal, and toast.
Do confirm every action with a toast, and give Undo on anything reversible or destructive.
Do teach in empty states — say what the list is for.
Do verify body text ≥4.5:1 and large text ≥3:1 before shipping.
Do prefer inline progressive disclosure over a modal.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right >1px as a colored accent).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism — no decorative blur or glass cards.
Don't add a second display font. One serif + one system sans is the entire pairing.
Don't put gray text on the dark header or on the tabs — use white at ≥0.6 opacity.
Don't stack the tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section.
Don't nest cards, or repeat identical icon-card grids.
Don't push the display heading above ~2.75rem or shrink any text below its AA contrast.
Don't reach for a modal first; prefer the inline row expand.
